prompt: Review the staged changes. This is a Helm chart for deploying an API server to Kubernetes.

assertions.text: Review identifies plaintext credentials in values.yaml as Critical
Review flags the missing container security context
Review notes that resource limits are empty
Review flags the hostPath volume mount as a security concern
Review identifies image tag 'latest' as problematic
Review notes missing health checks (no liveness or readiness probes)
Review recommends using Kubernetes Secrets or external secret manager
Review quotes the problematic YAML code inline before showing the fix
